rationale: Builds directly on the current best late projection EMA plus fp16-row rescue path instead of restarting. The new change only alters projection quantization: each int8 projection row now tries the current gentle clip and a looser alternative clip, then keeps whichever reconstructs that row with lower quantization error before the existing final roundtrip and EMA finalizer. That compounds the winning endgame while exploring a new category the recent runs have not exhausted: row-wise clip selection inside the real final quantizer, with negligible training-loop cost and no change to evaluation or artifact format.
title: Projection Dual-Clip Row Chooser
